# Arca OSS

Arca OSS is the public engineering index for Arca Systems. It documents open-source repositories Arca maintains, external open-source projects Arca supports, and upstream contribution records.

## Canonical sources

- [Arca OSS website](https://oss.arcabot.ai)
- [Source repository](https://github.com/arcabotai/oss)
- [Machine-readable index](https://oss.arcabot.ai/oss.json)
- [Arca on GitHub](https://github.com/arcabotai)
- [OpenClaw contribution ledger](https://github.com/arcabotai/arca-openclaw-contributions)
- [Live OpenClaw PR data](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arcabotai/arca-openclaw-contributions/main/data/openclaw-prs.json)
- [ClickClack origin PR #78](https://github.com/openclaw/clickclack/pull/78)
- [ClickClack merged PR #91](https://github.com/openclaw/clickclack/pull/91)
- [ClickClack merged PR #92](https://github.com/openclaw/clickclack/pull/92)

## Maintained and published projects

- [A3Stack](https://github.com/arcabotai/a3stack) — MIT-licensed agent infrastructure SDK.
- [Hypersnap Toolkit](https://github.com/arcabotai/hypersnap) — MIT-licensed node operations toolkit.
- [Ardea Knowledge Steward](https://github.com/arcabotai/ardea-knowledge-steward) — Apache-2.0 provenance-aware Q&A prototype.
- [OpenClaw Contributions](https://github.com/arcabotai/arca-openclaw-contributions) — MIT-licensed contribution ledger.
- [OpenClaw TUI Field Fix](https://github.com/arcabotai/openclaw-tui-deliver-stuck-spinner) — MIT-licensed diagnostic artifact.

## Upstream contribution evidence

- [ClickClack PR #91](https://github.com/openclaw/clickclack/pull/91) — merged integration-history helpers extracted from Arca's closed connector proposal; the implementation commit retains `Cad from Arca <cad@arcabot.ai>` as co-author, and the changelog thanks `@arcabotai`.
- [ClickClack PR #92](https://github.com/openclaw/clickclack/pull/92) — merged typed agent-progress SDK contracts with the same co-author and changelog credit.
- [ClickClack PR #78](https://github.com/openclaw/clickclack/pull/78) — original Hermes connector proposal; closed without merge and preserved as the provenance source for #91 and #92.
- [Hypersnap PR #10 review](https://github.com/farcasterorg/hypersnap/pull/10#pullrequestreview-4177281968) — Arca submitted a public `CHANGES_REQUESTED` security and correctness review on an upstream PR that was later merged.

## Evidence policy

Public source is not automatically open source; a project is listed as OSS only with an explicit license. Authored, open, closed, superseded, merged, and co-authored work remain distinct. Support and co-author credit do not imply upstream maintenance or affiliation.
